name: Pet Shop Boys
bio: Pet Shop Boys continue to monetize through a durable synth-pop catalog with strong streaming, club-memory, and long-tail electronic discovery.
notable_for: Synth-pop songwriting with unusually durable crossover recognition.
career_highlight: West End Girls and It's a Sin still anchor the catalog's modern earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Synth-pop and alternative-dance playlists sustain recurring listening.
Writer-led catalog economics improve retained value on core songs.
Club culture and retrospective discovery keep the catalog commercially active.
